Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement On Behalf Of Defts
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel P. Iannitelli of Fotouhi Epps Hillger Gilroy (362.9300) for respondent and moving party

No other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: RESPONDENT LAMPERTI CONTRACTING & DESIGN'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT WITH PETITIONERS MARTHA SOTO AND SANTOS SOTO is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANTS MARTHA SOTO, SANTOS SOTO DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. (All calendar matters this date originating out of Department 302, were called from Department 301 by Judge Busch, due to unavailability of Judge Woolard.) Robert D. Finkle, Esq. of Bradshaw & Associates (415) 433-4800, appearing for Cross Defendants and moving party. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: Court treats demurrer as a motion to strike (CCP section 436.) and the motion to strike is granted. Plaintiffs improperly named as cross-defendants. Lamperti states no affirmative claims are asserted against the Sotos in the cross-complaint. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW) Judge: Peter J. Busch; Court Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Denying Arbitration And Order Of Intervention Or Joinder Of All Parties And Issues Regarding Bamboo Flooring In The Pending Litigation (C.C.P. 1281.2(C))
Off Calendar Oct-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT LAMPERTI CONTRACTING & DESIGN'S Motion for an Order that the pending binding arbitration be stayed as to all issues regarding cabinet installation pending the resolution of the above entitled court Action. Pursuant to (C.C.P. 1281.2(C)). Appearances: Meredithe Kreis, Esq. of Bradshaw & Associates (415) 433-4800, appearing for Petitioner and opposing party; Daniel Iannitelli, Esq. of Fotouhi Epps Hillger Gilroy (415) 362-9300 appearing for Respondent and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: MOTION DENIED. Counsel to work together and correct caption on Proposed Order reflecting today's ruling. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Appoint Neutral Arbtirator; Notice Of Hearing Thereon;
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER MARTHA SOTO Notice Of Petition to Compel Arbitration and Appoint Neutral Arbitrator. Appearances: Meredithe Kreis, Esq. of Bradshaw & Assoc. (415) 433-4800 appearing for Petitioner and Moving party; Daniel Iannitelli, of Fotouhi Epps Hillger Gilroy (415) 362-9300 appearing for Respondent. The tentative ruling is not being contested. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. Defendant has ten days leave to file a cross-complaint for indemnity. Parties have agreed to an arbitrator. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
